mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scenic_spots WHERE delete_time IS NULL AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND region = #{region}
SELECT * FROM scenic_spots WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_time IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO scenic_spots (name, cover_image, images, region, address, latitude, longitude, description, highlights, ticket_info, open_time, traffic_info, tips, tags, rating, visit_count, like_count, is_hot, is_recommended, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time, notice, notice_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{coverImage}, #{images}, #{region}, #{address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{description}, #{highlights}, #{ticketInfo}, #{openTime}, #{trafficInfo}, #{tips}, #{tags}, #{rating}, #{visitCount}, #{likeCount}, #{isHot}, #{isRecommended}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{notice}, #{noticeTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE scenic_spots SET name = #{name}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, images = #{images}, region = #{region}, address = #{address}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, description = #{description}, highlights = #{highlights}, ticket_info = #{ticketInfo}, open_time = #{openTime}, traffic_info = #{trafficInfo}, tips = #{tips}, tags = #{tags}, rating = #{rating}, is_hot = #{isHot}, is_recommended = #{isRecommended}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime}, notice = #{notice}, notice_time = #{noticeTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE scenic_spots SET is_recommended = #{isRecommended}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE scenic_spots SET visit_count = visit_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM scenic_spots WHERE delete_time IS NULL AND status = 1 AND is_hot = 1 ORDER BY rating DESC, visit_count DESC LIMIT 10
